highlights.title: API Separation & Prefetching
highlights.problem: Main screen user info API took 2–3s, blocking the entire page load
highlights.solution: Designed a lightweight API with the backend for main screen data, moved heavy APIs to root-level background prefetching

highlights.title: E2E Testing & Reinforcement Learning Integration
highlights.problem: Some features required visual inspection, making automated testing impossible with existing methods
highlights.solution: Introduced E2E (Detox) + Jest via mock support; applied CNN reinforcement learning model for visually dependent test scenarios
highlights.result: Automated tests for key features and components; reduced error rate

highlights.title: Tanstack Query for Cache & Deduplication
highlights.problem: APIs re-fetched on every focus event, causing dozens of redundant requests per session
highlights.solution: Configured stale time per query, invalidated related data post-mutate via query client, removed complex useEffect-based state logic
highlights.result: Redundant API calls: dozens → 3–4 per session; improved state management productivity

highlights.title: API Mock Testing Feature
highlights.problem: No way to manually change frontend UI state, severely limiting test scenario coverage
highlights.solution: Integrated API Mock Adaptor covering 80% of API usage by log volume, added internal state control features
highlights.result: Improved dev productivity and reduced bug occurrence rate

highlights.title: Bundle Optimization
highlights.problem: Test code logic was included in production builds, inflating bundle size unnecessarily
highlights.solution: Used babel.config and metro.config to replace test sources with stub files at build time, stripped all console code

highlights.title: Legacy Code Cleanup & Expo Migration
highlights.problem: Play Store 16kb page issue, legacy library conflicts, and duplicated code slowing development velocity
highlights.solution: Migrated Expo 52 → 54, removed unsupported libraries, extracted shared hooks and components across key files
highlights.result: Page-level code reduced by 75%; improved maintainability and readability

highlights.title: 4-Stage Deployment Pipeline
highlights.problem: No automated pipeline for test execution or real-time OTA deployment as requirements grew
highlights.solution: Added npm auto-test scripts, EAS build/deploy/OTA channels, and a 4-stage pipeline: local / internal test / final test / release

seoulAiHackathon.title: Seoul AI Hackathon — Grand Prize (Seoul Mayor's Award)
description: Social platform 'Seoul Meari' combining AR guestbook, AI docent, VR history experience, and AI city diagnosis

kraftonJungle.title: Krafton Jungle Bootcamp — Completed
description: Studied data structures/algorithms and CS fundamentals (memory management, networking, OS)
Gained deep understanding of data structure internals through hands-on implementation
Implemented syscalls and virtual memory in a mini OS (Pintos), developing code comprehension and abstraction skills

jejuInvention.title: Jeju Regional University Invention & Creativity Contest — Silver Prize
description: 'Finger Airbag' — leveraging the relationship between object state changes and volume
